meaningEn: Your fave — the one you root for and support
meaningJa: 応援している人・キャラ
exampleEn: My oshi is precious again today.
socialConsequenceEn: Mainstream now — even on TV. Say it freely; you'll sound plugged into fan culture.

tag.sourceNote: 推す→推し。アイドル/VTuber文化から一般化

meaningEn: So precious / sublime (about your oshi or a ship)
meaningJa: (推しなどが)尊くてありがたい
socialConsequenceEn: Core fandom vocab. Among fans it's perfect; to non-fans it signals 'I am deep in it.'

tag.sourceNote: 本来の「尊い」を推し文化で転用

exampleJa: 今週のアニメ神回だった。
exampleEn: This week's anime episode was god-tier.
socialConsequenceEn: Widely used and safe. You'll sound like a normal fan hyping a good episode.

tag.sourceNote: 神+回。配信/アニメ実況で定着

meaningEn: A fandom rabbit hole you can't climb out of
meaningJa: 抜け出せないほどハマる対象
exampleJa: そのジャンル、完全に沼だよ。
exampleRomaji: sono janru, kanzen ni numa da yo.
socialConsequenceEn: Current and relatable. 'I fell into the ◯◯ 沼' is peak fan talk.

tag.sourceNote: 底なし沼の比喩。趣味没入を指す

meaningEn: That warm fuzzy fan-adoration for a character
meaningJa: キャラへの愛着・ときめき
socialConsequenceEn: Iconic 2000s otaku word — a bit retro now. Charming, slightly dated.

tag.sourceNote: 2000年代オタク文化の代表語。やや懐かしめ

meaningEn: Genuinely in love with an idol/streamer
meaningJa: アイドルや配信者に本気で恋すること
exampleJa: あの配信者にガチ恋してる。
exampleEn: I'm seriously in love with that streamer.
socialConsequenceEn: Real fan slang, a little intense — fine among fans, revealing to outsiders.

tag.sourceNote: ガチ+恋。アイドル/配信文化

meaningEn: Fan activities to support your oshi
exampleJa: 週末は推し活で忙しい。
socialConsequenceEn: Totally mainstream now. Say it proudly.

meaningJa: アニメ・漫画など二次元の世界
socialConsequenceEn: Core otaku word — reveals you're a fan.

meaningJa: 思春期にありがちな痛い背伸び
推しの新情報・コンテンツ
exampleEn: So much oshi content this month, precious.
socialConsequenceEn: Deep fan slang. Among fans only.

tag.sourceNote: 「供給」=コンテンツ提供の転用

meaningEn: Evangelizing your oshi (getting others into it)
meaningJa: 推しを勧めて広めること
exampleJa: 友達に布教して沼らせた。
exampleEn: Converted my friend into the fandom.

meaningEn: Refusing fans of the same oshi
meaningJa: 同じ推しのファンを避ける主義
socialConsequenceEn: Niche but real fandom stance. Insider only.
